name: withania somnifera (ashwagandha)
mechanism: Human evidence suggests modulation of hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal stress signaling and inflammatory mediators.
effects: May improve anxiety symptom scales in randomized trials
May improve sleep quality in stressed adults
contraindications: Use caution in autoimmune disease or with immunosuppressive therapy
